hypothesis: first-order LTI treatment-state x(L;a) controllability feature
design: immortal-time-safe landmark + nested CV (inner picks a,penalizer)
caveats: L=365 forward td-AUC is NaN: forward-horizon grid bug (horizons below the landmark -> negative forward time). Only L=180 evaluated.
+0.072 td-AUC from one treatment feature exceeds the proven ~0.62 static ceiling -> RED FLAG for residual immortal-time / reverse-causation leakage.

Base comparator is Cox(ISS) only (0.592)=weak; gate must also test LTI vs a STRONG baseline (Cox(ISS+gep70)) and vs a NEGATIVE-CONTROL treatment feature + permutation test before any beats-SOTA claim.
gate_beats_sota=PASS here is an UNVERIFIED nominal flag, NOT a claim. Adversarial verification is Iteration 2.
